judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit every expectation with equivalent, well-grounded evidence; they are comparable.

report_1.evidence: **"Export your visit history — Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF." (lines 22–24)** — **False / not shipped.** `app/routers/visits.py` has `# TODO: pdf export` and its `/visits` endpoint returns `[]`. ... **"Stronger account security — Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default." (lines 28–30)** — **False and security-sensitive.** `app/security/config.py` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`

report_2.evidence: **"Export your visit history … export their full visit history as a PDF."** — False. `app/routers/visits.py` returns an empty list and carries the comment `# TODO: pdf export` (`visits.py:11`). ... **"Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default."** — False, directly contradicted by code: `app/security/config.py:4` sets `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`

report_1.evidence: The "after" image (`after_scheduling.png`) is **not the scheduling calendar at all** — the image itself renders the text "BILLING / INVOICES," and `captures.json` records its route as `/billing/invoices`.

report_2.evidence: `after_scheduling.png` shows **"BILLING / INVOICES"** — an unrelated screen. `captures.json` confirms it at the source: `after_scheduling.png` was captured from route `"/billing/invoices"`, not `/schedule`.

report_1.evidence: **`after_export.png` — referenced (line 26) but missing.** No such file exists; it would render as a broken image. ... **`unused_capture_07.png` — exists but unreferenced (orphan).**

report_2.evidence: **`after_export.png` is referenced but does not exist.** ... **`unused_capture_07.png` exists but is referenced nowhere** — it is an orphan image showing "PATIENT LIST"

report_1.evidence: **Line 33: "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** — an internal drafting/disclaimer note that also flags the piece as an unfinished draft. Remove before sending.

report_2.evidence: **The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** — This is internal drafting/process metadata (an AI-attribution artifact), not customer content. ... it should not ship in a customer email. **Remove**
